case_title: JENNIFER HU ET AL VS. TASHE VIBE MUSIC, INC.DBA VYBE SOCIETY

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-07-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-07-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN. PLAINTIFF JENNIFER HU IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF JOSEPH FRARESSO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TASHE VIBE MUSIC, INC DBA VYBE SOCIETY IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY THOMAS CRYER, PRESIDENT. HONORABLE WILLIAM LYNN CORRECTS THE SPELLING OF THE DEFENDANTS NAME TO TASCHE VIBE MUSIC, INC. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$85.00) SERVED JUN-20-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TASCHE VIBE MUSIC, INC.DBA VYBE SOCIETY
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) THOMAS CRYER II, PRESIDENT FILED BY DEFENDANT TASCHE VIBE MUSIC, INC.DBA VYBE SOCIETY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-07-2023 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,097.50 FILED BY HU, JENNIFER FRARESSO, JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT TASCHE VIBE MUSIC, INC.DBA VYBE SOCIETY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-07-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY HU, JENNIFER FRARESSO, JOSEPH TASCHE VIBE MUSIC, INC.DBA VYBE SOCIETY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HU, JENNIFER FRARESSO, JOSEPH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TASCHE VIBE MUSIC, INC.DBA VYBE SOCIETY PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF TAKES NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
